global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a discount offer.

elements.label: Green gradient background
elements.description: A smooth green gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large black text that reads 'Hungry? We got you' positioned at the center top.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller black text below the headline that says 'Fresh favorites nearby'.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: Three outlined rectangles representing product images, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A bold black text '-30%' displayed prominently below the product images.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Order now' in black, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CraveLoop' in white text on a small rectangular background at the top left.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby -30% Order now

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' in black, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small white tag with the text 'UGC' in black, located at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top center, product images are in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
